semantic.role: CI/CD pipeline configuration for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Automated verification (build, unit test, protocol asset validation) for multiple Node.js versions
Release gate execution (readiness check for releases)
Package smoke check (verify npm publish snapshot)
outOfScope: Deployment to production or staging environments

English.purpose: This document defines the continuous integration workflow for the ArchSpine project. It ensures that every push or pull request to the main branches triggers a series of automated checks: building the project, running unit tests, validating protocol assets, executing a release gate, building documentation, and verifying the package structure.
English.context_and_audience: The document is intended for developers and maintainers of the ArchSpine mirror system. It describes the automated processes that guarantee code quality, release readiness, and documentation consistency. New contributors can use it to understand how changes are validated before merging.
key_takeaways: The pipeline runs on pushes to main/master and on pull requests.
Node.js versions 20 and 22 are tested in parallel.
A release gate step verifies that the project is ready for a new release.
Smoke checking the package ensures it can be published to npm without issues.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了 ArchSpine 项目的持续集成流程。每次向主干分支的推送或拉取请求都会触发一系列自动化检查：构建项目、运行单元测试、验证协议资产、执行发布门控、构建文档以及验证包结构。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向 ArchSpine 镜像系统的开发者和维护者。它描述了确保代码质量、发布就绪状态和文档一致性的自动化过程。新贡献者可以通过它了解在合并前变更如何被验证。
key_takeaways: 流水线在推送到 main/master 以及拉取请求时触发。
并行测试 Node.js 20 和 22 两个版本。
发布门控步骤验证项目是否已准备好进行新版本发布。
包的冒烟检查确保它可以在 npm 上顺利发布。
